creator: blackend@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to sfoster from comment #2)
misc/freebsd-doc-en is a master-port for all misc/freebsd-doc-* ports.  Hence, the dependencies.  We may try to separate the dependencies in future commits but textproc/docproj's options would have to be tweaked as well.
For the moment, the best solution is to use packages.
